discovered_services.0xE0-0x00: EvenHub App Service (createPage, imageUpdate, textUpdate, audioControl, heartbeat)

captures.label: Even AI (Hey Even)
captures.notes: Service 0x01 carries AI text content, 0xC4 likely audio, 0xC5 likely AI session control

captures.label: Conversate (clean)
captures.notes: Full Conversate protobuf decoded: field1=type(1=init,6=data,0xFF=marker), field2=seq, field8.1=text, field8.2=0partial/1final. Glasses ack with field1=0xA2. Captured transcription: Ok, Okay., I'm talking right now., Oh c'est tres bien super.

captures.label: Gestures full (tilt, single/double tap, scroll, long press, both hold)
Settings (display intensity/distance/height/balance, auto brightness, wear detection)
Settings focused (height, distance, wear detection, auto brightness)
Full loop: app load + connect glasses+ring + 3x AI sessions + sleep
captures.notes: 5 reconnection cycles visible (Samsung snoop buffer). FW 2.1.1.12, battery 100->83%. Full init sequence decoded (23 steps). Ring presence (0x91), STT config (0x03), notification whitelist (0xC5), widget dashboard (0x0E batch), news articles (0x01 type=9), DevSettings heartbeat (cmd=14), TTS audio event (type=8). AI sessions: 'OK hear me?', 'time in Geneva?', 'temperature in Geneva?'

notes: Parser bug fixed: pkt_serial is 1-indexed, changed >= to > in parse_g2_packet
Samsung SM-S948B requires bugreport method to pull btsnoop logs (no root)
Snoop log path on this device: /data/log/bt/btsnoop_hci.log
5 ATT handles active: 0x0842/0x0844 (main), 0x0864 (mic audio RX), 0x0882/0x0884 (display/secondary)
CORRECTED: Mic audio on UUID 6402 (display notify), NOT 7402. Handle 0x0864 in snoop = 0x0863 direct = UUID 6402
Mic streams immediately on 6402 notification subscribe - no explicit start command needed
Live mic capture CONFIRMED: 10s voice recording decoded successfully via direct BLE (no Even app)
CONFIRMED: Audio is LC3 codec, NOT encrypted. 5x40B LC3 frames per 205B BLE packet + 5B trailer
LC3 params: 10ms frame duration, 16kHz sample rate, 16-bit mono, 32kbps, 160 samples/frame
BLE packet format: [40B LC3][40B LC3][40B LC3][40B LC3][40B LC3][1B value][0x00][1B status][0xFF][1B seq]
Successfully decoded 82s of mic audio from Conversate capture using lc3codec npm package
Zero SCO packets in captures - all audio is over BLE custom profile, no classic BT needed
Audio handle 0x0864 is NOT wrapped in G2 transport (no 0xAA header) - raw LC3 frames directly
Service 0x01-0x20 confirmed as AI text delivery - carries news headlines and AI responses
Service 0x0B confirmed as Conversate - real-time transcription with partial/final markers
Service 0x0E-0x20 also carries R1 ring health insights (HR analysis text in field 2)
Service 0x80-0x00 contains ring device name in field 3: EVEN R1_8EAB6C
CORRECTED: Service 0xC4 is File Transfer (notify_whitelist.json), NOT audio. Header: [5B zeros][4B filesize_LE][4B checksum][path_string][zero padding to 93B]
CORRECTED: Service 0xC5 is Notification Whitelist JSON (app enable/disable list), NOT AI session control. JSON with calendar_enable, call_enable, msg_enable, app.list[{id,name}]
Sub-service pattern: 0x00=response, 0x01=event/ack, 0x20=command/data
Conversate protobuf: init(type=1), data(type=6, field8={text,is_final}), heartbeat(type=0xFF), ack(type=0xA2)
Audio codec CONFIRMED: LC3 32kbps, 5x40B frames per 205B BLE packet, 10ms/16kHz/mono

TIME SYNC FIX (2026-04-03): field2 in time sync protobuf is timezone offset in quarter-hours (UTC+2 = 8), NOT txid. Old code sent garbage txid (0xE8FFFFFFFFFFFFFF01). Fix: int(-time.altzone / 900). Glasses now show correct time.
HEAD TILT CONFIRMED via direct BLE (no app): events on 0x01-0x01 (single tap + STATE val=4), display on/off on 0x0D-0x01, dashboard cached in firmware
From g2_transport.proto: 0x03=Transcribe, 0x0C=Tasks, 0x20=Commit, 0x0A=Even AI(?), 0x05=Quick List(?), 0x08=Navigation(?)
Gesture events CONFIRMED on 0x01-0x01 (glasses->phone): field6.1=seq(1022+), field6.5=gesture, field6.3=state
KEY INSIGHT: Glasses report STATE CHANGES not gestures. No tap/swipe/longpress events - only position/item/display state outcomes.
CORRECTED GESTURE MAP (from live Flutter app testing 2026-04-04):
Previous capture-based map was WRONG. Live testing revealed:
SCROLL to position N: 2a06/2a08 with sub-fields encoding target position, NOT gesture type
2a06080112021001 = scroll to position 1 (was mislabeled as single_tap)
2a080801120408011002 = scroll to position 2 (was mislabeled as double_tap)
2a080801120408021003 = scroll to position 3 (was mislabeled as scroll)
2a080801120408031004 = scroll to position 4
TAP on dashboard item N: 2a04 08{N} + empty field tag
f1=3 = tap item 3 (was mislabeled as long_press)
f1=4 = tap item 4 (was mislabeled as both_hold)
f1=5 = tap item 5, f1=6 = tap item 6
TAP on item 1: goes through 0x0C service (080c10017200), NOT 0x01-0x01
EXIT item: 0x0C service with 72020801 flag
HEAD_TILT: STATE events with 1a XX 0a XX 08{pos} 1200
Teleprompter scroll: handled internally by firmware, NO BLE event sent
Dashboard scroll: position events sent, direction inferred from position change
head_tilt: STATE events via field6.3 with val counting down 10->1 (dashboard scroll)
EvenHub is on service 0xE0 (NOT 0x81): type=0 createPage, type=3 imageUpdate, type=5 textUpdate, type=9 audioControl, type=12 heartbeat
Conversate type=5: AI response card with icon(field7.1) + title(field7.2) + body(field7.3) + done(field7.4)
Conversate type=7: User prompt display with field13.2 = transcribed text
FULL AI PIPELINE WORKING: Glasses mic → Whisper STT → OpenClaw → glasses display. Published github.com/marienbaptiste/unofficial-even-g2-local-assistant
Glasses do NOT distinguish left vs right touchpad or scroll direction - app handles context
Device status on 0x09-0x01: firmware 2.1.1.12 (updated from 2.0.9.20), battery in field12, field8=30, field11=1 means charging
Display on/off via 0x0D-0x01: field3.1=1 means display on, empty field3 means display off
SETTINGS via 0x09-0x20 (from focused capture with 10s gaps, mapped by order):
field3.field12.f1=1: init/sync sent before each setting group
field3.field2.f1: display height AND distance - shares same field, values 0,5,6,8,12
field3.field3.f1: TO BE CONFIRMED - possibly auto brightness or other toggle
field3.field5.f1: CONFIRMED wear detection (tested via direct BLE toggle, beep heard on TEST 3)
field3.field1.f1: TO BE CONFIRMED - unknown, no beep when toggled
SETTINGS via 0x0E-0x20: intensity=widget5 f3=float(83-113), balance=widget6 f3/f4=float
SETTINGS via 0x0D-0x20: TO BE CONFIRMED - field2 value acts as setting ID (51,61,71,114,143,153,161,249)
EVENHUB FULL PROTO DECODED (2026-04-12, from capture analysis + protocol decode):
Top-level wrapper: field1=cmd, field2=magicRandom, then payload in cmd-specific field
Cmd=0 (field3): CreateStartUpPageContainer — field1=containerTotalNum, field3=repeated TextContainerProperty, field4=repeated ImageContainerProperty
Cmd=3 (field5): ImageRawDataUpdate — field1=containerID, field2=name, field3=sessionId, field4=totalSize, field5=compressMode(0=none), field6=fragmentIndex, field7=fragmentSize, field8=rawData
Cmd=5 (field9): TextContainerUpgrade — field1=containerID, field3=contentOffset, field4=contentLength, field5=content
Cmd=7 (field7): RebuildPageContainer — same struct as CreateStartUpPageContainer
Cmd=9 (field11): ShutDownContainer — field1=exitMode (0=immediate, 1=ask user)
Cmd=12 (field14): HeartBeatPacket — field1=cnt (optional counter)
Cmd=15 (field18): AudioCtrCmd — field1=audioFuncEn (1=enable mic, 0=disable mic) *** THIS IS THE MIC START COMMAND ***
Cmd=2 (field13): SendDeviceEvent (glasses->phone) — field1=ListEvent, field2=TextEvent, field3=SysEvent
TextContainerProperty: f1=x, f2=y, f3=width, f4=height, f5=borderWidth, f6=borderColor, f7=borderRadius, f8=padding, f9=containerID, f10=name, f11=isEventCapture, f12=content
ImageContainerProperty: f1=x, f2=y, f3=width(20-288), f4=height(20-144), f5=containerID, f6=name
OsEventType: 0=CLICK, 1=SCROLL_TOP, 2=SCROLL_BOTTOM, 3=DOUBLE_CLICK, 4=FOREGROUND_ENTER, 5=FOREGROUND_EXIT, 6=ABNORMAL_EXIT, 7=SYSTEM_EXIT
NOTE: Scroll direction is SWAPPED between iOS and Android!
Image fragments: 4096 bytes each, 200ms delay between sends
Quad-tile layout: container IDs 10-13 for 4x 200x100 tiles covering 400x200 display
AUTH SEQUENCE DECODED (2026-04-12, from capture analysis):
1. Connect BOTH left (_L_) and right (_R_) ears
2. Auth LEFT: svc 0x80 cmd=4, field3={secAuth=true, phoneType=4(Android)/3(iOS)} (200ms delay)
3. Auth RIGHT: same as above (200ms delay)
4. Pipe role: svc 0x80 cmd=5, field4={asCmdRole=1} to RIGHT only (200ms delay)
5. Time sync: svc 0x80 cmd=128, field128={timestamp=unix_s, timezone=hours_from_gmt} to BOTH (200ms delay)
6. Skip onboarding: svc 0x10 cmd=1, field3={processId=4} (500ms delay)
7. Start heartbeats: EvenHub cmd=12 + DevSettings cmd=14, both every 5s
8. Battery poll: every 10th EvenHub heartbeat (~50s)
BRIGHTNESS CONTROL DECODED (2026-04-12): svc 0x09 cmd=1, field3.field1={autoAdjust=1/0, brightnessLevel=N}
BATTERY RESPONSE DECODED (2026-04-12): svc 0x09 response field5=leftFW(string), field6=rightFW(string), field12=battery(0-100), field13=chargingStatus(0/1)
DISPLAY BMP FORMAT CONFIRMED (2026-04-12): 4-bit indexed grayscale, 118-byte header, 16-entry color table [0,17,34,...,255], bottom-up rows, padded to 4-byte boundary
MAJOR DISCOVERY (2026-04-12): Even AI session goes through SERVICE 0x07 (Dashboard), NOT a dedicated AI service!
AI SESSION FLOW on 0x07-0x20 (confirmed from 'Hey Even' capture):
type=10: INIT/SYNC — field13={f1=0, f2=80}, sent at connection and before AI session
type=1:  DASHBOARD_WAKE �� field3={f1=3} = head tilt trigger, field3={f1=2} = other trigger
type=9:  HEARTBEAT/KEEPALIVE — field11={f1=1}, sent repeatedly during AI session
type=3:  LIVE_TRANSCRIPTION — field5={f1=0, f2=0, f4=text}, progressive STT updates
type=2:  VOICE_INPUT_DONE �� field4={f1=2}, signals end of speech
type=4:  AI_THINKING — field6=empty, glasses show thinking indicator
type=5:  AI_RESPONSE_STREAM — streams text chunks in field5 (or field7), glasses display response
Captured question: 'What is Dominato right now in Geneva?'
AI response streamed in ~5 chunks of 80-150 bytes each on type=5
Service 0x01-0x20 carries STOCK DATA (not AI): found 'Ubisoft Entertainment' + float values = stock tickers
Service 0x01 type map: type=2 f1=2 = data push, type=5 f7={f1=1} = separator, type=7 f9={f1=1} = marker, type=8 f10={f1=5} = glasses ack
Service 0x07-0x01 (Dashboard Events from glasses): type=1 f3={f1=3} = head tilt detected
65 dashboard packets in this capture vs 24 on 0x01 — Dashboard is the primary AI channel
Display canvas confirmed: 576x288 pixels (from capture analysis), quad-tile subset 400x200
EvenHub response fields: field4=StartupResCmd, field6=ImgResCmd, field8=RebuildResCmd, field10=TextResCmd
EvenHub error codes: 0=page_success, 4=img_success, 5=img_failed, 6=rebuild_success, 7=rebuild_failed, 8=text_success, 9=text_failed
reserveFlag (status byte bit5): set to 1 for EvenHub/G2Setting/Onboarding, 0 for DevSettings
FULL INIT SEQUENCE CONFIRMED (2026-04-14, from 5 reconnection cycles in single capture):
EXACT ORDER: 1) 0x80 cmd=4 auth LEFT, 2) 0x80 cmd=5 pipe role f4={f1=1}, 3) 0x80 cmd=128 time sync
4) 0x80 cmd=4 auth RIGHT, 5) 0x09 type=1 sensor/brightness config, 6) 0x03 type=0 STT models
7) 0x0D type=0 device config, 8) 0x0C type=2 tasks query, 9) 0x07 type=10 dashboard init
10) 0x10 type=1 skip onboarding, 11) 0x91 type=1 ring presence, 12) 0x09 type=2 battery/fw query
13) 0x01 type=2 news/stock init, 14) 0x81 type=1 EvenHub init, 15) 0xC4 file transfer
16) 0xC5 notification whitelist JSON, 17) 0x20 type=0+1 commit, 18) 0x09 type=1 button mapping
19) 0x0C type=2 tasks refresh, 20) 0x80 cmd=128 second time sync, 21) 0x04 type=1 display wake config
SDK GAP: Our auth.dart only does steps 1-3+9. Steps 4-8, 10-21 not implemented.
0x91 RING PRESENCE DECODED (2026-04-14): f3={f1=<6B MAC: 6CAB8E1925EB>, f2=1(active), f3=0(status)}. Registers ring connectivity at init.

0x03 STT CONFIG DECODED (2026-04-14): f3.f1=10(count), f3.f2[]=repeated {f1=0/1(type), f2=0/1(enabled), f3=model_name, f4=id}. Models: 'saleseye-universal'(10321), 'soPHICON'(10075). Language IDs: 1,4,5,6,7,8,11,266
0xC5 NOTIFICATION WHITELIST DECODED (2026-04-14): JSON with calendar_enable, call_enable, msg_enable, ios_mail_enable, app.enable, app.list[{id:'com.discord',name:'Discord'},...12 apps]

0x0E WIDGET DASHBOARD DECODED (2026-04-14): type=1 individual, type=2 batch(145B). Widget IDs: 2=stocks(10000ms), 3=news(2000ms), 4=separator, 5=display_intensity(f3=left_brightness,f4=right_brightness as float32), 6=balance, 9=unknown
Widget 5 brightness values: f3=63.0 (left), f4=68.0 (right) — PER-EYE brightness control!

0x01 NEWS ARTICLE DECODED (2026-04-14): type=9 f11={f2=0, f3=category(5), f6=headline, f7=timestamp_ms, f8=source_name, f9=body}. Multi-fragment up to 17 frags (3.9KB). type=2=init, type=5=separator, type=7=batch_marker
0x01-0x01 DASHBOARD SCROLL EVENTS (2026-04-14): type=3 f2=0x12345678(magic), f6={f1=position, f5/f3=sub_state}. Glasses report dashboard scroll/tap position.
cmd=14 on 0x80 = DEVSETTINGS HEARTBEAT (2026-04-14): f1=14, f2=msgId, f13=[](empty). 17 instances during AI sessions. Separate from Dashboard heartbeat (type=9).
0x07-0x01 type=8 = AUDIO TTS EVENT (2026-04-14): f10={f1=2}=TTS started playing. Sent after AI response streamed to glasses.
AUTH PIPE ROLE DISCREPANCY (2026-04-14): Capture shows cmd=5 f4={f1=1} but auth.dart sends f4={f1=2}. Comment says f1=2 required for wake detection — may be intentional override.
0x04 DISPLAY WAKE CONFIG (2026-04-14): f3={f1=1, f2=1, f3=5, f5=1}. Consistent across all 5 reconnections. f3=5 might be wake timeout (seconds).
0x20 COMMIT (2026-04-14): type=0 f3={f1=0} = reset, type=1 f4=[] = query -> response f4={f1=10}. f1=10 could be max dashboard items or version.
0x81 EVENHUB INIT RESPONSE (2026-04-14): f3={f1=100, f2=1}. f1=100 could be max container capacity.

remaining_captures.notes: Gestures go through 0x01-0x01, NOT EvenHub. Display state via 0x0D-0x01.

remaining_captures.feature: EVENHUB: Container page system (from official SDK)
remaining_captures.action: Capture createStartUpPageContainer, rebuildPageContainer protobuf on service 0x81
remaining_captures.notes: Page = up to 12 containers (8 text + 4 image). TextContainerProperty has x/y/width/height/border/content. ImageContainerProperty has x/y/width(20-288)/height(20-144). ListContainerProperty has items with selection.

remaining_captures.action: Capture textContainerUpgrade — partial text update with containerID, contentOffset, contentLength

remaining_captures.notes: Image limits: 20-288px wide, 20-144px tall. Supports number[], base64, Uint8Array.

remaining_captures.action: Capture imuControl enable/disable and IMU_Report_Data (x,y,z doubles)
remaining_captures.notes: Configurable report rate: 100-1000ms. Reports x/y/z accelerometer/gyro. Event type = IMU_DATA_REPORT (8).

remaining_captures.feature: EVENHUB: Event system with touch source
